S.FORM: mwagakwaku saka sicizi kaykameane.
S.PHON: mwagakwaku saka siʦizi kajkaməanə.
S.FORM: mwagakwaku saka sicizi kaykameane.
S.PHON: mwagakwaku saka siʦizi kajkaməanə.
S.TRANSL: 我今天七點到學校。
I arrived at school at seven today.

S.FORM: lribulrunga mwadanenga ka sinsi amiakay ka pangcange, "acegecega si sukubua"
S.PHON: ɭibuɭuŋa mwadanəŋa ka sinsi amiakaj ka paŋʦaŋə, "aʦəgəʦəga si sukubua"
S.FORM: lribulrunga mwadanenga ka sinsi amiakay ka pangcange, "acegecega si sukubua"
S.PHON: ɭibuɭuŋa mwadanəŋa ka sinsi amiakaj ka paŋʦaŋə, "aʦəgəʦəga si sukubua"
S.TRANSL: 上課了，老師走進教室，班長說:「起立!敬禮!」
It’s time for class , the teacher walked into the classroom, and the monitor said: “Stand up! Salute!”

S.FORM: takwaadraw iyakay, "sinsi mwadringadringaisu"
S.PHON: takwaaɖaw ijakaj, "sinsi mwaɖiŋaɖiŋaisu"
S.FORM: takwaadraw iyakay, "sinsi mwadringadringaisu"
S.PHON: takwaaɖaw ijakaj, "sinsi mwaɖiŋaɖiŋaisu"
S.TRANSL: 我們大聲的說:「老師好。」
We said loudly, “Hi, teacher.”

S.FORM: sabulrubulru, ku singsi wabulru nayyane ku sasiasipane ku kacalrilrisyanane.
S.PHON: sabuɭubuɭu, ku siŋsi wabuɭu najjanə ku sasiasipanə ku kaʦaɭiɭisjananə.
S.FORM: sabulrubulru, ku singsi wabulru nayyane ku sasiasipane ku kacalrilrisyanane.
S.PHON: sabuɭubuɭu, ku siŋsi wabuɭu najjanə ku sasiasipanə ku kaʦaɭiɭisjananə.
S.TRANSL: 上課的時候，老師教我們數字的族語。
In class, the teacher taught us the Rukai language of numbers.

S.FORM: twapapalra nay ki sinsi silrigu, lasenay nay ku sasiasipane ku pacase.
S.PHON: twapapaɭa naj ki sinsi siɭigu, lasənaj naj ku sasiasipanə ku paʦasə.
S.FORM: twapapalra nay ki sinsi silrigu, lasenay nay ku sasiasipane ku pacase.
S.PHON: twapapaɭa naj ki sinsi siɭigu, lasənaj naj ku sasiasipanə ku paʦasə.
S.TRANSL: 我們跟著老師唸，我們唱了數字歌。
We followed the teacher to read, we sang the number song.

S.FORM: makalra ku kibulruli ku kacalrilrisyanane ku vaga.
S.PHON: makaɭa ku kibuɭuli ku kaʦaɭiɭisjananə ku vaga.
S.FORM: makalra ku kibulruli ku kacalrilrisyanane ku vaga.
S.PHON: makaɭa ku kibuɭuli ku kaʦaɭiɭisjananə ku vaga.
S.TRANSL: 我學會好多族語。
I have learned many Rukai languages.

S.FORM: lukakaiya mwagakwaku lukakaiya kiabulrwaku ku kacalrilrisyanane ku vaga. lri kawrivaku pakilalra ki ina
S.PHON: lukakaija mwagakwaku lukakaija kiabuɭwaku ku kaʦaɭiɭisjananə ku vaga. ɭi kawrivaku pakilaɭa ki ina
S.FORM: lukakaiya mwagakwaku lukakaiya kiabulrwaku ku kacalrilrisyanane ku vaga. lri kawrivaku pakilalra ki ina
S.PHON: lukakaija mwagakwaku lukakaija kiabuɭwaku ku kaʦaɭiɭisjananə ku vaga. ɭi kawrivaku pakilaɭa ki ina
S.TRANSL: 我天天上學，我天天學族語，我要講給媽媽聽。
I go to school every day, I learn the Rukai language every day, and I want to tell my mother.

S.FORM: ku naganeli sya Sula.
S.PHON: ku naganəli sja sula.
S.FORM: ku naganeli sya Sula.
S.PHON: ku naganəli sja sula.
S.TRANSL: 我的名字是Sula。
My name is Sula.

S.FORM: ku ama sya Ngilriu.
S.PHON: ku ama sja ŋiɭiu.
S.FORM: ku ama sya Ngilriu.
S.PHON: ku ama sja ŋiɭiu.
S.TRANSL: 我爸爸的名字是Ngilriu。
My dad’s name is Ngilriu.

S.FORM: ku ina sya Peresange.
S.PHON: ku ina sja pərəsaŋə.
S.FORM: ku ina sya Peresange.
S.PHON: ku ina sja pərəsaŋə.
S.TRANSL: 我媽媽的名字是Peresange。
My mother’s name is Peresange.

S.FORM: kayasane tara mangealenga kay caylili.
S.PHON: kajasanə tara maŋəaləŋa kaj ʦajlili.
S.FORM: kayasane tara mangealenga kay caylili.
S.PHON: kajasanə tara maŋəaləŋa kaj ʦajlili.
S.TRANSL: 我今年10歲。
I am 10 years old.

S.FORM: yakay ku tangea ku kaka ka sawvalay, sia Kaku taramangealenga si vaeva ku caylini.
S.PHON: jakaj ku taŋəa ku kaka ka sawvalaj, sia kaku taramaŋəaləŋa si vaəva ku ʦajlini.
S.FORM: yakay ku tangea ku kaka ka sawvalay, sia Kaku taramangealenga si vaeva ku caylini.
S.PHON: jakaj ku taŋəa ku kaka ka sawvalaj, sia kaku taramaŋəaləŋa si vaəva ku ʦajlini.
S.TRANSL: 我有一個哥哥，他叫Kaku，他今年11歲。
I have a brother, his name is Kaku, he is 11 years old.

S.FORM: ykaynay ki tayngea ki gaku bingkingkiw.
S.PHON: jkajnaj ki tajŋəa ki gaku biŋkiŋkiw.
S.FORM: ykaynay ki tayngea ki gaku bingkingkiw.
S.PHON: jkajnaj ki tajŋəa ki gaku biŋkiŋkiw.
S.TRANSL: 我們在同一間學校讀書。
We study in the same school.

S.FORM: kunaku si kaka ka sawvalay taramadalame nay senay.
S.PHON: kunaku si kaka ka sawvalaj taramadalamə naj sənaj.
S.FORM: kunaku si kaka ka sawvalay taramadalame nay senay.
S.PHON: kunaku si kaka ka sawvalaj taramadalamə naj sənaj.
S.TRANSL: 我和哥哥都喜歡唱歌。
Both my brother and I like to sing.

S.FORM: madalamaku lrededepe, lukatatelradhane maredele nay ka wacekecekele lrededepe.
S.PHON: madalamaku ɭədədəpə, lukatatəɭaðanə marədələ naj ka waʦəkəʦəkələ ɭədədəpə.
S.FORM: madalamaku lrededepe, lukatatelradhane maredele nay ka wacekecekele lrededepe.
S.PHON: madalamaku ɭədədəpə, lukatatəɭaðanə marədələ naj ka waʦəkəʦəkələ ɭədədəpə.
S.TRANSL: 我喜歡游泳，放假的時候，我們全家會一起去游泳。
I like swimming. During the holidays, our whole family go swimming together.

S.FORM: madalamaku silaliali sitalrailragi lrikarededelenay seasenay si lrededepe.
S.PHON: madalamaku silaliali sitaɭaiɭagi ɭikarədədələnaj səasənaj si ɭədədəpə.
S.FORM: madalamaku silaliali sitalrailragi lrikarededelenay seasenay si lrededepe.
S.PHON: madalamaku silaliali sitaɭaiɭagi ɭikarədədələnaj səasənaj si ɭədədəpə.
S.TRANSL: 我喜歡認識新朋友，我們可以一起唱歌和游泳。
I love meeting new people, we can sing and swim together.

S.FORM: lalakaku ki Ngudradrekay.
S.PHON: lalakaku ki ŋuɖaɖəkaj.
S.FORM: lalakaku ki Ngudradrekay.
S.PHON: lalakaku ki ŋuɖaɖəkaj.
S.TRANSL: 我是魯凱族的小孩。
I am an Ngudradrekay child.

S.FORM: ku daanenay yakay Vedai.
S.PHON: ku daanənaj jakaj vədai.
S.FORM: ku daanenay yakay Vedai.
S.PHON: ku daanənaj jakaj vədai.
S.TRANSL: 我們家住在霧台。
Our family lives in Vedai.

S.FORM: talrimanay ka wacekecekele.
S.PHON: taɭimanaj ka waʦəkəʦəkələ.
S.FORM: talrimanay ka wacekecekele.
S.PHON: taɭimanaj ka waʦəkəʦəkələ.
S.TRANSL: 我們家共有五個人。
There are five people in our family.

S.FORM: tatultunay ka lamatakataka.
S.PHON: tatultunaj ka lamatakataka.
S.FORM: tatultunay ka lamatakataka.
S.PHON: tatultunaj ka lamatakataka.
S.TRANSL: 我們家有三個兄弟姊妹。
There are three brothers and sisters in our family.

S.FORM: amaniaku si ama ina kaka ka sawvalay si kaka ka ababay yaelrelrenay.
S.PHON: amaniaku si ama ina kaka ka sawvalaj si kaka ka ababaj jaəɭəɭənaj.
S.FORM: amaniaku si ama ina kaka ka sawvalay si kaka ka ababay yaelrelrenay.
S.PHON: amaniaku si ama ina kaka ka sawvalaj si kaka ka ababaj jaəɭəɭənaj.
S.TRANSL: 我跟爸爸、媽媽、哥哥和姊姊住在一起。
I live with my father, mother, brother and sister.

S.FORM: ku ama maelrenge ku ama kisace.
S.PHON: ku ama maəɭəŋə ku ama kisaʦə.
S.FORM: ku ama maelrenge ku ama kisace.
S.PHON: ku ama maəɭəŋə ku ama kisaʦə.
S.TRANSL: 我的爸爸很高，我的爸爸是警察。
My father is tall and he is a policeman.

S.FORM: ku ina kuladhane ku ina tarasulrasulraw.
S.PHON: ku ina kulaðanə ku ina tarasuɭasuɭaw.
S.FORM: ku ina kuladhane ku ina tarasulrasulraw.
S.PHON: ku ina kulaðanə ku ina tarasuɭasuɭaw.
S.TRANSL: 我的媽媽很瘦，我的媽媽是醫生。
My mother is thin and my mom is a doctor.

S.FORM: luitavanane ku ama wakacalrilrisiane lumakaurivariva naiyane.
S.PHON: luitavananə ku ama wakaʦaɭiɭisianə lumakaurivariva naijanə.
S.FORM: luitavanane ku ama wakacalrilrisiane lumakaurivariva naiyane.
S.PHON: luitavananə ku ama wakaʦaɭiɭisianə lumakaurivariva naijanə.
S.TRANSL: 爸爸在家會和我們說族語。
My father speaks the Rukai language with us at home.

S.FORM: lukatatelradhane ki kaladralrangedrangane mwacekelenay.
S.PHON: lukatatəɭaðanə ki kalaɖaɭaŋəɖaŋanə mwaʦəkələnaj.
S.FORM: lukatatelradhane ki kaladralrangedrangane mwacekelenay.
S.PHON: lukatatəɭaðanə ki kalaɖaɭaŋəɖaŋanə mwaʦəkələnaj.
S.TRANSL: 我們暑假都會回部落。
We will all go back to the tribe during the summer vacation.

S.FORM: Kwaku si lakaka maredele kiiyaw.
S.PHON: kwaku si lakaka marədələ kiijaw.
S.FORM: Kwaku si lakaka maredele kiiyaw.
S.PHON: kwaku si lakaka marədələ kiijaw.
S.TRANSL: 我和兄姊會一起抓青蛙。
My brothers and sisters and I will catch frogs together.

S.FORM: madalamaku ki wacekecekeleli
S.PHON: madalamaku ki waʦəkəʦəkələli
S.FORM: madalamaku ki wacekecekeleli
S.PHON: madalamaku ki waʦəkəʦəkələli
S.TRANSL: 我很喜歡我們家的人。
I like our family very much.

S.FORM: Kunaku si ina kiavavangenay kaykameane.
S.PHON: kunaku si ina kiavavaŋənaj kajkaməanə.
S.FORM: Kunaku si ina kiavavangenay kaykameane.
S.PHON: kunaku si ina kiavavaŋənaj kajkaməanə.
S.TRANSL: 今天我和媽媽出去玩。
I went out with my mother today.

S.FORM: Kayvaiyane masalaame kay belenge kai makecelre kai madralrangedrange kay vai ngangengerece kay saseverane
S.PHON: kajvaijanə masalaamə kaj bələŋə kai makəʦəɭə kai maɖaɭaŋəɖaŋə kaj vai ŋaŋəŋərəʦə kaj sasəvəranə
S.FORM: Kayvaiyane masalaame kay belenge kai makecelre kai madralrangedrange kay vai ngangengerece kay saseverane
S.PHON: kajvaijanə masalaamə kaj bələŋə kai makəʦəɭə kai maɖaɭaŋəɖaŋə kaj vai ŋaŋəŋərəʦə kaj sasəvəranə
S.TRANSL: 白天的天空很藍，天氣不冷也不熱，風很涼爽。
The sky is blue during the day, the weather is neither cold nor hot, and the wind is cool.

S.FORM: yakaynay ki cakena ki ubulu kanekane kay pange, laku vaivainay lakaculu kay kinawmasane madu
S.PHON: jakajnaj ki ʦakəna ki ubulu kanəkanə kaj paŋə, laku vaivainaj lakaʦulu kaj kinawmasanə madu
S.FORM: yakaynay ki cakena ki ubulu kanekane kay pange, laku vaivainay lakaculu kay kinawmasane madu
S.PHON: jakajnaj ki ʦakəna ki ubulu kanəkanə kaj paŋə, laku vaivainaj lakaʦulu kaj kinawmasanə madu
S.TRANSL: 我們在草地上吃著麵包，陽光灑在身上，非常溫暖。
We ate bread on the grass, the sun was shining on us, and it was very warm.

S.FORM: samakawlringedele, laaduduli kay subelebelenge
S.PHON: samakawɭiŋədələ, laaduduli kaj subələbələŋə
S.FORM: samakawlringedele, laaduduli kay subelebelenge
S.PHON: samakawɭiŋədələ, laaduduli kaj subələbələŋə
S.TRANSL: 下午，天空變紅了。
In the afternoon, the sky turned red.

S.FORM: la kivagaku ki ina anika duduli ka subelebelenge
S.PHON: la kivagaku ki ina anika duduli ka subələbələŋə
S.FORM: la kivagaku ki ina anika duduli ka subelebelenge
S.PHON: la kivagaku ki ina anika duduli ka subələbələŋə
S.TRANSL: 我問媽媽，為甚麼天空是紅色的。
I asked my mother why the sky is red.

S.FORM: Ku ina laiyakay, laulri kela ku valrigi.
S.PHON: ku ina laijakaj, lauɭi kəla ku vaɭigi.
S.FORM: Ku ina laiyakay, laulri kela ku valrigi.
S.PHON: ku ina laijakaj, lauɭi kəla ku vaɭigi.
S.TRANSL: 媽媽說，可能是颱風要來了。
Mom said, maybe the typhoon is coming.

S.FORM: kadrwa ku ememe kaymaungu ngiabwale ka tariau.
S.PHON: kaɖwa ku əməmə kajmauŋu ŋiabwalə ka tariau.
S.FORM: kadrwa ku ememe kaymaungu ngiabwale ka tariau.
S.PHON: kaɖwa ku əməmə kajmauŋu ŋiabwalə ka tariau.
S.TRANSL: 晚上天上沒有雲，星星出來了。
There were no clouds in the sky at night, and the stars came out.

S.FORM: lamiyalrinay lri utavananenganay
S.PHON: lamijaɭinaj ɭi utavananəŋanaj
S.FORM: lamiyalrinay lri utavananenganay
S.PHON: lamijaɭinaj ɭi utavananəŋanaj
S.TRANSL: 我們也要回家了。
We were going home too.

S.FORM: sa lri utavananenay ikadalranane lapelaelaku ki tariau ku urikayli
S.PHON: sa ɭi utavananənaj ikadaɭananə lapəlaəlaku ki tariau ku urikajli
S.FORM: sa lri utavananenay ikadalranane lapelaelaku ki tariau ku urikayli
S.PHON: sa ɭi utavananənaj ikadaɭananə lapəlaəlaku ki tariau ku urikajli
S.TRANSL: 在回家的路上，我跟星星許願，
On the way home, I made a wish with the stars,

S.FORM: anatumane la kai kela ku valrigi apiakivavangeana naku.
S.PHON: anatumanə la kai kəla ku vaɭigi apiakivavaŋəana naku.
S.FORM: anatumane la kai kela ku valrigi apiakivavangeana naku.
S.PHON: anatumanə la kai kəla ku vaɭigi apiakivavaŋəana naku.
S.TRANSL: 希望颱風不要來，我還想再出去玩。
I hope the typhoon doesn't come, I still want to go out to play again.

S.FORM: yathili ki danenay ku gakuli lukavaivai panwa dadavacaku mugaku la dadavacaku mutavanane
S.PHON: jaθili ki danənaj ku gakuli lukavaivai panwa dadavaʦaku mugaku la dadavaʦaku mutavananə
S.FORM: yathili ki danenay ku gakuli lukavaivai panwa dadavacaku mugaku la dadavacaku mutavanane
S.PHON: jaθili ki danənaj ku gakuli lukavaivai panwa dadavaʦaku mugaku la dadavaʦaku mutavananə
S.TRANSL: 我的學校在我們家旁邊，我天天走路去學校，也走路回家。
My school is next to our house, I walk to school every day, and I also walk home.

S.FORM: kai swaadraw ku gakunay kai tapangale ku banudhu la mathingathingalenay makanaelre.
S.PHON: kai swaaɖaw ku gakunaj kai tapaŋalə ku banuðu la maθiŋaθiŋalənaj makanaəɭə.
S.FORM: kai swaadraw ku gakunay kai tapangale ku banudhu la mathingathingalenay makanaelre.
S.PHON: kai swaaɖaw ku gakunaj kai tapaŋalə ku banuðu la maθiŋaθiŋalənaj makanaəɭə.
S.TRANSL: 我們學校不大，沒有很多學生，大家互相認識。
Our school is not big, there are not many students, everyone knows each other.

S.FORM: sanaka lavavalake yaielrelre ikay talailailadhane, karededele ngimaimalri, karededele kalaelaelange.
S.PHON: sanaka lavavalakə jaiəɭəɭə ikaj talailailaðanə, karədədələ ŋimaimaɭi, karədədələ kalaəlaəlaŋə.
S.FORM: sanaka lavavalake yaielrelre ikay talailailadhane, karededele ngimaimalri, karededele kalaelaelange.
S.PHON: sanaka lavavalakə jaiəɭəɭə ikaj talailailaðanə, karədədələ ŋimaimaɭi, karədədələ kalaəlaəlaŋə.
S.TRANSL: 所有小朋友會聚在操場，一起玩球、一起聊天。
All the children will gather in the playground, play ball and chat together.

S.FORM: ku lasingsi si kunay lamaelrenay kivavange, maadraw kay tacekecekelanenay ikay gaku.
S.PHON: ku lasiŋsi si kunaj lamaəɭənaj kivavaŋə, maaɖaw kaj taʦəkəʦəkəlanənaj ikaj gaku.
S.FORM: ku lasingsi si kunay lamaelrenay kivavange, maadraw kay tacekecekelanenay ikay gaku.
S.PHON: ku lasiŋsi si kunaj lamaəɭənaj kivavaŋə, maaɖaw kaj taʦəkəʦəkəlanənaj ikaj gaku.
S.TRANSL: 老師們也會和我們一起玩，學校是個大家庭。
The teachers also play with us, the school is one big family.

S.FORM: lukakaiya tara wasuasuapenay makanaelre pakabula ki takibulrubulrwnenay
S.PHON: lukakaija tara wasuasuapənaj makanaəɭə pakabula ki takibuɭubuɭwnənaj
S.FORM: lukakaiya tara wasuasuapenay makanaelre pakabula ki takibulrubulrwnenay
S.PHON: lukakaija tara wasuasuapənaj makanaəɭə pakabula ki takibuɭubuɭwnənaj
S.TRANSL: 我們每天都要打掃，大家要把教室打掃乾淨。
We have to clean every day, and everyone has to clean the classroom.

S.FORM: yakay ku drumane ku waselredre ki lribange yakay ku drumane ku waswape.
S.PHON: jakaj ku ɖumanə ku wasəɭəɖə ki ɭibaŋə jakaj ku ɖumanə ku waswapə.
S.FORM: yakay ku drumane ku waselredre ki lribange yakay ku drumane ku waswape.
S.PHON: jakaj ku ɖumanə ku wasəɭəɖə ki ɭibaŋə jakaj ku ɖumanə ku waswapə.
S.TRANSL: 有些人去擦窗戶，有些人去掃地。
Some people clean the windows, some sweep the floor.

S.FORM: sanaka pacingane gaku laswapenay, maparauralubu makanaelre, lukakaiya laka takabulane kay gakunay
S.PHON: sanaka paʦiŋanə gaku laswapənaj, maparauralubu makanaəɭə, lukakaija laka takabulanə kaj gakunaj
S.FORM: sanaka pacingane gaku laswapenay, maparauralubu makanaelre, lukakaiya laka takabulane kay gakunay
S.PHON: sanaka paʦiŋanə gaku laswapənaj, maparauralubu makanaəɭə, lukakaija laka takabulanə kaj gakunaj
S.TRANSL: 我們nay 打掃學校的各個角落，大家分工合作，學校每天都很乾淨。
We will also clean every corner of the school. Everyone works together, and the school is very clean every day.

S.FORM: kuiya mwa cekelaku lrikape ki umu.
S.PHON: kuija mwa ʦəkəlaku ɭikapə ki umu.
S.FORM: kuiya mwa cekelaku lrikape ki umu.
S.PHON: kuija mwa ʦəkəlaku ɭikapə ki umu.
S.TRANSL: 昨天，我去部落拜訪爺爺。
Yesterday, I went to visit my grandpa in the tribe.

S.FORM: mauulaynganay kai madredrele, laka barengerenganaku iniane.
S.PHON: mauulajŋanaj kai maɖəɖələ, laka barəŋərəŋanaku inianə.

S.PHON: mauulajŋanaj kai maɖəɖələ, laka barəŋərəŋanaku inianə.
S.TRANSL: 我們很久沒有見面了，我很想念他。
We haven't seen each other for a long time and I miss him a lot.

S.FORM: sadrele nakwane kwi umu, lapakane nakwane ku sikwa, lapaungulu nakwane ku uaca.
S.PHON: saɖələ nakwanə kwi umu, lapakanə nakwanə ku sikwa, lapauŋulu nakwanə ku uaʦa.

S.PHON: saɖələ nakwanə kwi umu, lapakanə nakwanə ku sikwa, lapauŋulu nakwanə ku uaʦa.
S.TRANSL: 爺爺一看到我，就請我吃西瓜，請我喝茶。
As soon as grandpa saw me, he invited me to eat watermelon and drink tea.

S.FORM: kay lredreke ki umu kay sikwa, tengatengane ka malimeme
S.PHON: kaj ɭəɖəkə ki umu kaj sikwa, təŋatəŋanə ka maliməmə

S.PHON: kaj ɭəɖəkə ki umu kaj sikwa, təŋatəŋanə ka maliməmə
S.TRANSL: 爺爺種的西瓜很甜，真的很好吃。
The watermelon grown by grandpa is very sweet and really delicious.

S.FORM: lamialri madalamaku kwi lredreke ki umu kwi uca, maiyalri kalimeme lu ungulane
S.PHON: lamiaɭi madalamaku kwi ɭəɖəkə ki umu kwi uʦa, maijaɭi kaliməmə lu uŋulanə

S.TRANSL: 我也喜歡爺爺的茶，也很好喝。
I also like grandpa's tea, it's tasted good too.

S.FORM: lumulringedele, kunaku si kayngu masilangenay aga ku kudrali.
S.PHON: lumuɭiŋədələ, kunaku si kajŋu masilaŋənaj aga ku kuɖali.

S.TRANSL: 中午的時候，我和奶奶一起煮午餐。
At noon, I cooked lunch with my grandma.

S.FORM: taykalrane ku aga ki kayngu ku kudrali, yakay ku kange yakay ku kuka yakay ku gulrugulrane laikaiyana ku kalralringidri.
S.PHON: tajkaɭanə ku aga ki kajŋu ku kuɖali, jakaj ku kaŋə jakaj ku kuka jakaj ku guɭuguɭanə laikaijana ku kaɭaɭiŋiɖi.

S.TRANSL: 奶奶煮了很豐盛的午餐，有魚、有雞、有南瓜、還有蝸牛。
Grandma cooked a big lunch, including fish, chicken, pumpkin, and snails.

S.FORM: samaka tukudralinganay la mwanay lalacengane kilacenge
S.PHON: samaka tukuɖaliŋanaj la mwanaj lalaʦəŋanə kilaʦəŋə

S.PHON: samaka tukuɖaliŋanaj la mwanaj lalaʦəŋanə kilaʦəŋə
S.TRANSL: 吃完午餐後，我們去菜園摘菜。
After lunch, we went to the vegetable garden to pick vegetables.

S.FORM: wamalra ngukalra ku kayngu ku urasi tai kucai bai nakwane iluka putavanane laiya nakuane

S.TRANSL: 奶奶拿了很多地瓜、芋頭和蕗蕎給我，要我帶回家。
Grandma brought me a lot of sweet potatoes, taro and buckwheat, and asked me to take them home.

S.FORM: lakipusavaku liniane, si iyakay lrikelanaku pela drele numyane.
S.PHON: lakipusavaku linianə, si ijakaj ɭikəlanaku pəla ɖələ numjanə.

S.TRANSL: 我跟他們道別，說下次再去看他們。
I said goodbye to them and said I'd see them next time.

S.TRANSL: 今天老師帶我們去動物園，我們在門口排隊買票。
Today the teacher took us to the zoo, and we lined up at the gate to buy tickets.

S.FORM: sa udanenay taudriudripane, ku sinsi la iyakay, "tadhadhamane kwi cucubunguta tasulravane kwi lrilrikudru tangisasiavava makanaelre."

S.TRANSL: so you can visit them yourself.""
After entering the zoo, the teacher said, There are birds in the front and snakes in the back

S.FORM: makiucaku ki sulraw, anikamani kainaku wadredrele ki lasulraw.
S.PHON: makiuʦaku ki suɭaw, anikamani kainaku waɖəɖələ ki lasuɭaw.

S.TRANSL: 我會怕蛇，所以我不看蛇類。
I'm afraid of snakes, so I don't look at snakes.

S.FORM: wadrelaku ku makalra ku adhadhame, yakay belenge ki angatu ngipapapalay, ladrelaku ki kwici wapece ikay ki adringi ki barungulu ki angatu.

S.TRANSL: 我看到了很多鳥，他們在樹上飛來飛去，還有看到貓頭鷹在樹洞裡睡覺。
I saw a lot of birds flying around in the trees and saw owls sleeping in tree hollows.

S.FORM: taudriudripane yakay ku zu rigi si lrikulaw, kunadruma kainaku wadreleana kikay lawaudriudripi, kay tadrelaneli kaykameane kiaragadhaku
S.PHON: tauɖiuɖipanə jakaj ku zu rigi si ɭikulaw, kunaɖuma kainaku waɖələana kikaj lawauɖiuɖipi, kaj taɖəlanəli kajkaməanə kiaragaðaku

S.TRANSL: 動物園裡有大象、馬和老虎，我從前沒有看過這些動物，今天看到了真的很開心。
There are elephants, horses and tigers in the zoo. I have never seen these animals before. I was really happy to see them today.

S.FORM: taykalrane ku sasingili, wasasingaku lapadrelaku ki ama si ina.

I took a lot of pictures and showed them to my parents.

S.TRANSL: 下次要跟爸爸媽媽一起來。

S.TRANSL: 這個假日，我和姊姊去台東拜訪叔叔。
This holiday, my sister and I went to Taitung to visit my uncle.

S.FORM: twalaynay Taihuku ngukisa mua Taitung.
S.PHON: twalajnaj taihuku ŋukisa mua taituŋ.
S.FORM: twalaynay Taihuku ngukisa mua Taitung.

S.TRANSL: 我們從台北搭火車去臺東。
We took the train from Taipei to Taitung.

S.FORM: sa darurunay Taitung ku agi ki am ka sauvalay la kidresenge nayyane mutisaba
S.PHON: sa darurunaj taituŋ ku agi ki am ka sauvalaj la kiɖəsəŋə najjanə mutisaba

S.PHON: sa darurunaj taituŋ ku agi ki am ka sauvalaj la kiɖəsəŋə najjanə mutisaba
S.TRANSL: 到了台東，叔叔開車來車站接我們。
When we arrived in Taitung, my uncle drove to the station to pick us up.

S.PHON: kai ŋuaku θainuanə ku tadailanə ki danə ki agi ki ama lu huŋtiŋanə kai taraθainu ladaruru madu

S.TRANSL: 車站離叔叔家沒有很遠，開車一下子就到了。
The station is not far from my uncle's house, and it's just a short drive away.

S.TRANSL: 叔叔家附近有個很大的牧場，我們一起騎腳踏車到牧場。
There is a big ranch near my uncle's house, and we rode bicycles to the ranch together.

In the ranch, my uncle took us to feed the sheep and ride horses.

S.TRANSL: 晚上，我們一起去市區吃飯。
In the evening, we went to the city to have dinner together.

There are a lot of cars in the city, so we go there by motorcycle.

S.PHON: sa ɭi kidailiŋanaj alaka kia kupa ku utubai lakatuasəŋanaj ŋubələŋə ŋukaj ki basə

S.TRANSL: 要離開的時候，發現摩托車被偷了，我們只好搭公車離開。
When we were about to leave, we found that the motorcycle had been stolen, so we had to leave by bus.

S.FORM: ladarurunganay Taihuku lakainay thingale luka kiadringainga ku utubay ki agi ki ama.

S.TRANSL: 現在我們回到台北了，不知道叔叔的摩托車找到了沒有。
Now that we are back in Taipei, I don't know if my uncle's motorcycle has been found.

S.FORM: saka lavavalakenay yaVedai ku danenay saugakunga latalela mu Pingtung lacekecekelenay ikay dratane.
S.PHON: saka lavavalakənaj javədai ku danənaj saugakuŋa lataləla mu piŋtuŋ laʦəkəʦəkələnaj ikaj ɖatanə.

S.TRANSL: 小時候我們家住在霧台，上學以後，就搬到了屏東，一直在都市裡生活。
When we were young, our family lived in Vedai. After I started school, we moved to Pingtung and have been living in the city ever since.

S.FORM: samwangaku ki daygake laki bulrwaku ku patharwakay ki kaudhane ki kacalrisyane, ala thingalaku makaelaeela ku ngiradekane ku kakudhane.
S.PHON: samwaŋaku ki dajgakə laki buɭwaku ku paθarwakaj ki kauðanə ki kaʦaɭisjanə, ala θiŋalaku makaəlaəəla ku ŋiradəkanə ku kakuðanə.
S.FORM: samwangaku ki daygake laki bulrwaku ku patharwakay ki kaudhane ki kacalrisyane, ala thingalaku makaelaeela ku ngiradekane ku kakudhane.

S.TRANSL: 上了大學以後，我修了一堂關於原住民文化的課程，瞭解到臺灣原住民族有各式各樣豐富的文化。
After I went to college, I took a course on aboriginal culture and learned that the aboriginal people in Taiwan have various and rich cultures.

S.FORM: Lakamani, kayasane kay tatelratrlradhane ki kaladralrangedrangane, kwaku si kaka lamubalriunay kivavaga ki tarudrawdrange apia thingalenay ki bengkata.
S.PHON: lakamani, kajasanə kaj tatəɭatrɭaðanə ki kalaɖaɭaŋəɖaŋanə, kwaku si kaka lamubaɭiunaj kivavaga ki taruɖawɖaŋə apia θiŋalənaj ki bəŋkata.
S.FORM: Lakamani, kayasane kay tatelratrlradhane ki kaladralrangedrangane, kwaku si kaka lamubalriunay kivavaga ki tarudrawdrange apia thingalenay ki bengkata.
S.PHON: lakamani, kajasanə kaj tatəɭatrɭaðanə ki kalaɖaɭaŋəɖaŋanə, kwaku si kaka lamubaɭiunaj kivavaga ki taruɖawɖaŋə apia θiŋalənaj ki bəŋkata.
S.TRANSL: 因此，今年暑假時，我和哥哥回到部落訪問老人家，想要瞭解自己族群的文化。
So this summer, my brother and I went back to our tribe to visit the elderly, hoping to understand the culture of our own ethnic group.

S.FORM: taramavalrulunga ku tarudrwdrang, ai ludrelane miakaw yaengecengeana.
S.PHON: taramavaɭuluŋa ku taruɖwɖaŋ, ai luɖəlanə miakaw jaəŋəʦəŋəana.

S.PHON: taramavaɭuluŋa ku taruɖwɖaŋ, ai luɖəlanə miakaw jaəŋəʦəŋəana.
S.TRANSL: 老人家已經八十歲了，但是看起來還像中年人。
The old man is already eighty years old, but he still looks like a middle-aged man.

S.FORM: lakivagaku iniane taypyane ku thingalesu ku vaga, ngudradreadrekadhane macalrusi lukawriva, lamialri thingale ku swa Tayrezukuane, Kecyaneu, si matatubalre ki Dripung.
S.PHON: lakivagaku inianə tajpjanə ku θiŋaləsu ku vaga, ŋuɖaɖəaɖəkaðanə maʦaɭusi lukawriva, lamiaɭi θiŋalə ku swa tajrəzukuanə, kəʦjanəu, si matatubaɭə ki ɖipuŋ.
S.FORM: lakivagaku iniane taypyane ku thingalesu ku vaga, ngudradreadrekadhane macalrusi lukawriva, lamialri thingale ku swa Tayrezukuane, Kecyaneu, si matatubalre ki Dripung.
S.PHON: lakivagaku inianə tajpjanə ku θiŋaləsu ku vaga, ŋuɖaɖəaɖəkaðanə maʦaɭusi lukawriva, lamiaɭi θiŋalə ku swa tajrəzukuanə, kəʦjanəu, si matatubaɭə ki ɖipuŋ.
S.TRANSL: 我問他會哪些語言，他的魯凱族語說得很流利，也會說泰雅語、客家話和日本話。
I asked him which languages he knew, and he was fluent in Rukai, as well as Atayal, Hakka and Japanese.

S.FORM: sakivaganganaku alaka singkalavavalake kibulru Dridripungane ku vaga, ku taelrelreini swa Tayrezuku, ikay ki takauaunganeini lathingale ki swa Kecya, lakamani ku kalrigilini ku taykalrane ku vaga.
S.PHON: sakivagaŋanaku alaka siŋkalavavalakə kibuɭu ɖiɖipuŋanə ku vaga, ku taəɭəɭəini swa tajrəzuku, ikaj ki takauauŋanəini laθiŋalə ki swa kəʦja, lakamani ku kaɭigilini ku tajkaɭanə ku vaga.

S.TRANSL: 我問他才知道，原來他小時候就學日本話，太太是泰雅族人，而他工作上認識許多客家人，所以他會說這麼多語言。
I asked him to find out that he learned Japanese when he was a child, his wife is an Atayal, and he knows many Hakkas at work, so he can speak so many languages.

S.FORM: sama kivavaganay, tarudraudrang, lamatikay ki talwalupane ki sidruadrumane.
S.PHON: sama kivavaganaj, taruɖauɖaŋ, lamatikaj ki talwalupanə ki siɖuaɖumanə.

S.TRANSL: 我們訪談的時候，老人家談論了許多關於狩獵的傳統知識。
During our interview, the old man talked about a lot of traditional knowledge about hunting.

S.FORM: unu, kainay lrimaka ngulre thingale, ai arasucinay sassing ala lrikilalranay pudridringai.
S.PHON: unu, kainaj ɭimaka ŋuɭə θiŋalə, ai arasuʦinaj sassiŋ ala ɭikilaɭanaj puɖiɖiŋai.

S.TRANSL: 雖然我們沒有辦法完全聽懂，但是我們有用手機錄影，可以再仔細聆聽。
Although we could’t fully understand it, we could record it on our cell phones and listen to it more.

S.FORM: saka lavavalakaku kainaku wathingale pangukay ki kakwakudhane ki kacalrisiane, kay takakacalrisyaneli yakay ku takalrumalaneli.
S.PHON: saka lavavalakaku kainaku waθiŋalə paŋukaj ki kakwakuðanə ki kaʦaɭisianə, kaj takakaʦaɭisjanəli jakaj ku takaɭumalanəli.
S.FORM: saka lavavalakaku kainaku wathingale pangukay ki kakwakudhane ki kacalrisiane, kay takakacalrisyaneli yakay ku takalrumalaneli.

S.TRANSL: 小時候我不瞭解自己族群的文化，對於自己是原住民有點不好意思。
When I was young, I didn’t understand the culture of my ethnic group, and I was a little embarrassed that I was an aborigine.

S.FORM: saka kalranga ku thingaleli la arudradraranaku taka Ngudradrekadhaneli ku taukalrivilane.
S.PHON: saka kaɭaŋa ku θiŋaləli la aruɖaɖaranaku taka ŋuɖaɖəkaðanəli ku taukaɭivilanə.

S.TRANSL: 瞭解愈多以後，愈覺得自己身為魯凱族人，是很獨特的，也很值得驕傲。
The more I know, the more I feel that being a Rukai is unique and something to be proud of.

S.FORM: kaykameane luka miwaubu lriutavanane kwi agili ka sawvalay.
S.PHON: kajkaməanə luka miwaubu ɭiutavananə kwi agili ka sawvalaj.

S.TRANSL: 今天傍晚，弟弟就要回家了。
My younger brother is going home this evening.

S.PHON: kunaku si kajŋu, wamwanaj talaʦəŋanə ki siwbai laŋai ku kuka paduɭu aganə ku kwaubu si pakanə ki agili ka sawvalaj.

S.TRANSL: 我和奶奶去市場買雞，準備煮好吃的晚餐給弟弟。
My grandma and I went to the market to buy chickens and prepared a delicious dinner for my younger brother.

S.FORM: nguakakaynay talacengane ki siwbai. kwi siwbai ki talacengane lakataykalrane ku taukamanimani ku lacenge.

S.TRANSL: 我們經過了菜攤，菜攤有好多新鮮的青菜。
We passed the vegetable stand, which had a lot of fresh green vegetables.

S.FORM: lalangainay ku kungsingccay, tuba, si duduli ka daykungu.
S.PHON: lalaŋainaj ku kuŋsiŋʦʦaj, tuba, si duduli ka dajkuŋu.

S.TRANSL: 我們買了空心菜、山藥和胡蘿蔔。
We bought water spinach, yams and carrots.

S.FORM: kudra yathili siwbai ki madru ki angatu kudra lawpang laiyajkay, "kay pangudraleli si mumu sangalwalu langadha ngubebekele."
S.PHON: kuɖa jaθili siwbai ki maɖu ki aŋatu kuɖa lawpaŋ laijajkaj, "kaj paŋuɖaləli si mumu saŋalwalu laŋaða ŋubəbəkələ."

S.TRANSL: 旁邊水果攤的老闆說:「我的鳳梨和桃子很甜。買一些吧!」
The owner of the nearby fruit stand said: “My pineapples and peaches are very sweet. Buy some!”

S.FORM: lalangainay ku pangudrale si mumu.
S.PHON: lalaŋainaj ku paŋuɖalə si mumu.
S.FORM: lalangainay ku pangudrale si mumu.
S.PHON: lalaŋainaj ku paŋuɖalə si mumu.
S.TRANSL: 我們買了鳳梨和桃子。
We bought pineapples and peaches.

S.FORM: nguakakayinay siwbai ki butulu lawpang laiyakay, "lrilangaisu ku manemane? kaykameane maricuru kay kuka si lakadraw, ku vaeva tulru ka idai."

S.FORM: nguakakayinay siwbai ki butulu lawpang laiyakay, "lrilangaisu ku manemane? kaykameane maricuru kay kuka si lakadraw, ku vaeva tulru ka idai."

S.TRANSL: 我們經過了肉攤，老闆說:「你要買什麼?今天的雞又大又肥，一隻300元。」
We passed the meat stall, and the boss said, “What do you want to buy? Today’s chickens are big and fat, and one is 300 NTD.”

S.FORM: kwi kayngu makucingalrenga laiya, lakivaga ki lawpang tudwadwadha.
S.PHON: kwi kajŋu makuʦiŋaɭəŋa laija, lakivaga ki lawpaŋ tudwadwaða.

S.TRANSL: 奶奶覺得太貴了，問老闆可不可以便宜一點。
Grandma thought it was too expensive and asked the boss if it could be cheaper.

S.FORM: ai kwi laupange amiyakay syamadwainga kai lrimakakivalanga ku nidang.
S.PHON: ai kwi laupaŋə amijakaj sjamadwaiŋa kai ɭimakakivalaŋa ku nidaŋ.

S.TRANSL: 但老闆說已經很便宜，不能再減了。
But the boss said that it is already very cheap and cannot be reduced any further.

S.FORM: pasiagisi ka lawpange laiyakay, bwala langadha kay kangeli, kay kangeli madwai laka tadradraw.
S.PHON: pasiagisi ka lawpaŋə laijakaj, bwala laŋaða kaj kaŋəli, kaj kaŋəli madwai laka taɖaɖaw.

S.TRANSL: 隔壁的老闆說，來買我的魚，我的魚又大又便宜。
The boss next door said, come and buy my fish, my fish is big and cheap.

S.FORM: sakabilrilanenga lalangainay ku kuka si kange, lautavanane tudamai tangea ki cukui.

S.TRANSL: 最後我們買了雞也買了魚，回家煮了一桌子的菜。
In the end we bought chicken and fish, and went home to cook a table of food.

S.FORM: laukalava kaulay madradrimidrimitinga.
S.PHON: laukalava kaulaj maɖaɖimiɖimitiŋa.
S.FORM: laukalava kaulay madradrimidrimitinga.
S.PHON: laukalava kaulaj maɖaɖimiɖimitiŋa.
S.TRANSL: 等了好久，天已經黑了。
After waiting for a long time, it was already dark.

S.PHON: paŋuadiŋiva ku agili ka sawvalaj ijakaj kaj takwapiŋanə kiarimu kai patəɭai, lubaɭiθiŋa ki niʦiwbi ɭiwbaɭivaku.

S.TRANSL: 弟弟打電話回來說，軍隊突然不能放假了，要下一個禮拜日才回來。
The younger brother called back and said that the army suddenly couldn’t take a vacation and would not be back until the next Sunday.

S.FORM: kayngu amyakay, makalra kay agali, dawla latakane makanaelre!
S.PHON: kajŋu amjakaj, makaɭa kaj agali, dawla latakanə makanaəɭə!

S.PHON: kajŋu amjakaj, makaɭa kaj agali, dawla latakanə makanaəɭə!
S.TRANSL: 奶奶說已經煮了這麼多，叫大家一起來吃吧!
Grandma said that she has cooked so much, so let’s eat together!

S.FORM: wadaulunay ki retesanenay lakarededelenay kisupilri kay kwabu.
S.PHON: wadaulunaj ki rətəsanənaj lakarədədələnaj kisupiɭi kaj kwabu.

S.PHON: wadaulunaj ki rətəsanənaj lakarədədələnaj kisupiɭi kaj kwabu.
S.TRANSL: 我們邀請了親朋好友，一起來享用豐盛的晚餐。
We invited friends and family to have a great dinner together.

S.FORM: yakay ku papalrali ki bulru sya Liucu, laka takarimirimurane ku lamanemaneini
S.PHON: jakaj ku papaɭali ki buɭu sja liuʦu, laka takarimirimuranə ku lamanəmanəini
S.FORM: yakay ku papalrali ki bulru sya Liucu, laka takarimirimurane ku lamanemaneini
S.PHON: jakaj ku papaɭali ki buɭu sja liuʦu, laka takarimirimuranə ku lamanəmanəini
S.TRANSL: 我有一個同學叫Liucu，他常常忘記帶東西。
I have a classmate named Liucu, he often forgets to bring things.

S.FORM: lukibulrubulru, lakisalru ki papalraini ku sapacapacasane, sasakisakidrane ka gumu si cuming.
S.PHON: lukibuɭubuɭu, lakisaɭu ki papaɭaini ku sapaʦapaʦasanə, sasakisakiɖanə ka gumu si ʦumiŋ.

S.TRANSL: 上課的時候，他跟同學借鉛筆、橡皮擦或是筆記本。
During class, he borrowed pencils, erasers or notebooks from his classmates.

S.FORM: sanguvale sangupusale sangutulrulu, la pakisalru iniane ku lamanemane makanaelre.
S.PHON: saŋuvalə saŋupusalə saŋutuɭulu, la pakisaɭu inianə ku lamanəmanə makanaəɭə.

S.PHON: saŋuvalə saŋupusalə saŋutuɭulu, la pakisaɭu inianə ku lamanəmanə makanaəɭə.
S.TRANSL: 一次、兩次、三次，大家會借東西給他。
Once, twice, three times, everyone would lend him something.

S.FORM: ai yakay ku malisi ku kakudhaneini, kiasalru lakai saulriulri.
S.PHON: ai jakaj ku malisi ku kakuðanəini, kiasaɭu lakai sauɭiuɭi.

S.TRANSL: 但是他有個壞習慣，經常借了東西卻不還。
But he has a bad habit of often borrowing things but not returning them.

S.FORM: sakabilrilanenga, lakai apipakisalrunga makanaelre.
S.PHON: sakabiɭilanəŋa, lakai apipakisaɭuŋa makanaəɭə.

S.PHON: sakabiɭilanəŋa, lakai apipakisaɭuŋa makanaəɭə.
S.TRANSL: 最後大家都不想借他東西了。
In the end, no one wanted to borrow anything from him.

S.FORM: laikay sakanimakavalane lakarededelenay ngulatatadre makanaelre.
S.PHON: laikaj sakanimakavalanə lakarədədələnaj ŋulatataɖə makanaəɭə.
S.FORM: laikay sakanimakavalane lakarededelenay ngulatatadre makanaelre.
S.PHON: laikaj sakanimakavalanə lakarədədələnaj ŋulatataɖə makanaəɭə.
S.TRANSL: 有一天，我們大家一起去郊遊。
One day, we all went on an outing together.

S.FORM: ikay kadadalranane la apimulricungu, ai lakarimuru ku sasakisakidrane ku senate.
S.PHON: ikaj kadadaɭananə la apimuɭiʦuŋu, ai lakarimuru ku sasakisakiɖanə ku sənatə.

S.TRANSL: 路途中，Liucu想上廁所，但他忘記帶衛生紙。
On the way, Liucu wanted to go to the bathroom, but he forgot to bring toilet paper.

S.FORM: lakisalru ki papalraini ki bulru ku sasakisakidrane ku senate., ai makituamiakay tubalre makanaelre, kainaku wailuku.
S.PHON: lakisaɭu ki papaɭaini ki buɭu ku sasakisakiɖanə ku sənatə., ai makituamiakaj tubaɭə makanaəɭə, kainaku wailuku.
S.FORM: lakisalru ki papalraini ki bulru ku sasakisakidrane ku senate., ai makituamiakay tubalre makanaelre, kainaku wailuku.

S.TRANSL: 他跟同學借衛生紙，可是大家都回他說，我也沒有帶耶。
He borrowed toilet paper from his classmates, but everyone told him that I didn’t bring them either.

S.FORM: lagelrethe kwi Liucu, lakalisi iyakay, anukai pakisalru nakwane makanaelre ku sasakisakidrane ku senate!
S.PHON: lagəɭəθə kwi liuʦu, lakalisi ijakaj, anukai pakisaɭu nakwanə makanaəɭə ku sasakisakiɖanə ku sənatə!
S.FORM: lagelrethe kwi Liucu, lakalisi iyakay, anukai pakisalru nakwane makanaelre ku sasakisakidrane ku senate!
S.PHON: lagəɭəθə kwi liuʦu, lakalisi ijakaj, anukai pakisaɭu nakwanə makanaəɭə ku sasakisakiɖanə ku sənatə!
S.TRANSL: Liucu急的哭了出來。他生氣的說，為什麼大家都不借我衛生紙!
Liucu burst into tears. He said angrily, why don’t everyone lend me toilet paper!

S.FORM: latubalre ku papalraini ki bulru, iyakay anikamani yai kaisu ngiailuku si lupakisalrwane muswane ku lamanemane lakaisu saulriulri!
S.PHON: latubaɭə ku papaɭaini ki buɭu, ijakaj anikamani jai kaisu ŋiailuku si lupakisaɭwanə muswanə ku lamanəmanə lakaisu sauɭiuɭi!
S.FORM: latubalre ku papalraini ki bulru, iyakay anikamani yai kaisu ngiailuku si lupakisalrwane muswane ku lamanemane lakaisu saulriulri!
S.PHON: latubaɭə ku papaɭaini ki buɭu, ijakaj anikamani jai kaisu ŋiailuku si lupakisaɭwanə muswanə ku lamanəmanə lakaisu sauɭiuɭi!
S.TRANSL: 同學告訴他，因為你都不自己帶，而且借給你的東西，你都不會還!
The classmate told him, because you didn’t bring it yourself, and you wouldn’t return the things lent to you!

S.FORM: sakakaiyane samugaku langulalakese mugaku kwi Liucu, ku kisalruini ki papalraini ki bulru lasaulri liniane patulre ku lamanemane.
S.PHON: sakakaijanə samugaku laŋulalakəsə mugaku kwi liuʦu, ku kisaɭuini ki papaɭaini ki buɭu lasauɭi linianə patuɭə ku lamanəmanə.
S.FORM: sakakaiyane samugaku langulalakese mugaku kwi Liucu, ku kisalruini ki papalraini ki bulru lasaulri liniane patulre ku lamanemane.

S.TRANSL: 隔天上學，Liucu很早就到學校了，Liucu把跟同學借的東西都還給同學們。
The next day at school, Liucu arrived at school early and returned everything he had borrowed from his classmates.

S.FORM: lakaiseasene ki papalraini ki bulru kwi Liucu, si iyakay lringiailukunganaku ku lamanemaneli, ku syaswalane taubangalranenumi pakisalru nakawane maelanenga.
S.PHON: lakaisəasənə ki papaɭaini ki buɭu kwi liuʦu, si ijakaj ɭiŋiailukuŋanaku ku lamanəmanəli, ku sjaswalanə taubaŋaɭanənumi pakisaɭu nakawanə maəlanəŋa.
S.FORM: lakaiseasene ki papalraini ki bulru kwi Liucu, si iyakay lringiailukunganaku ku lamanemaneli, ku syaswalane taubangalranenumi pakisalru nakawane maelanenga.
S.PHON: lakaisəasənə ki papaɭaini ki buɭu kwi liuʦu, si ijakaj ɭiŋiailukuŋanaku ku lamanəmanəli, ku sjaswalanə taubaŋaɭanənumi pakisaɭu nakawanə maəlanəŋa.
S.TRANSL: Liucu向同學們道歉，並說他以後一定會自己帶東西，也謝謝同學們之前願意借他東西。
Liucu apologized to the students and said that he would definitely bring his own things in the future, and thanked the classmates for their willingness to lend him things before.

S.FORM: tarualualupu ikay ki cekelenay ku ama.
S.PHON: tarualualupu ikaj ki ʦəkələnaj ku ama.
S.FORM: tarualualupu ikay ki cekelenay ku ama.
S.PHON: tarualualupu ikaj ki ʦəkələnaj ku ama.
S.TRANSL: 我的爸爸是部落的獵人。
My dad is a hunter of the tribe.

S.FORM: saka lavavalakeana ku ama si agini lukamaungu mualatadre, lailuku ku bakale si kwange.
S.PHON: saka lavavalakəana ku ama si agini lukamauŋu mualataɖə, lailuku ku bakalə si kwaŋə.
S.FORM: saka lavavalakeana ku ama si agini lukamaungu mualatadre, lailuku ku bakale si kwange.
S.PHON: saka lavavalakəana ku ama si agini lukamauŋu mualataɖə, lailuku ku bakalə si kwaŋə.
S.TRANSL: 我小的時候，爸爸和叔叔會在晚上出門，帶著獵刀和獵槍。
When I was little, my dad and uncle would go out at night with hunting knives and guns.

S.FORM: luka liarenga lailuku ku panalini ku waudriudripi.
S.PHON: luka liarəŋa lailuku ku panalini ku wauɖiuɖipi.
S.FORM: luka liarenga lailuku ku panalini ku waudriudripi.
S.PHON: luka liarəŋa lailuku ku panalini ku wauɖiuɖipi.
S.TRANSL: 天亮時，他們就會帶著獵到的獵物回來。
At daybreak, they returned with their prey.

S.FORM: yakay luka babui yakay luka bubutu avavale ikay ku padavathane.
S.PHON: jakaj luka babui jakaj luka bubutu avavalə ikaj ku padavaθanə.
S.FORM: yakay luka babui yakay luka bubutu avavale ikay ku padavathane.
S.PHON: jakaj luka babui jakaj luka bubutu avavalə ikaj ku padavaθanə.
S.TRANSL: 有時候是山豬、有時候是飛鼠，偶爾也會有雉雞。
Sometimes it was a boar, sometimes a flying squirrel, and occasionally a pheasant.

S.FORM: Lapavavalanenga ikay ki sangangudane ki cekele, pakisupilri ki cekele.
S.PHON: lapavavalanəŋa ikaj ki saŋaŋudanə ki ʦəkələ, pakisupiɭi ki ʦəkələ.
S.FORM: Lapavavalanenga ikay ki sangangudane ki cekele, pakisupilri ki cekele.
S.PHON: lapavavalanəŋa ikaj ki saŋaŋudanə ki ʦəkələ, pakisupiɭi ki ʦəkələ.
S.TRANSL: 他們會在村口將獵物分好，分享給族人。
They would divide the prey at the entrance of the village and share it with the tribe.

S.FORM: laka tamakavaladhaneli ki ama ku atupalrane alupu.
S.PHON: laka tamakavalaðanəli ki ama ku atupaɭanə alupu.
S.FORM: laka tamakavaladhaneli ki ama ku atupalrane alupu.
S.PHON: laka tamakavalaðanəli ki ama ku atupaɭanə alupu.
S.TRANSL: 我每次都會吵著爸爸，要跟著爸爸去打獵。
Every time I quarreled with my father, I wanted to go hunting with my father.

S.FORM: ku ama laiyakay lukadraungasu, nawilukunga muswane alupu.
S.PHON: ku ama laijakaj lukaɖauŋasu, nawilukuŋa muswanə alupu.
S.FORM: ku ama laiyakay lukadraungasu, nawilukunga muswane alupu.
S.PHON: ku ama laijakaj lukaɖauŋasu, nawilukuŋa muswanə alupu.
S.TRANSL: 爸爸說等我長大了他再帶我一起去。
Dad said that he would take me with me when I grew up.

S.FORM: kay yacekele kay lamalala arakay ku kateme ki waudriudripi, lakalrigili aratukulru si lrenege drepete ki kateme.
S.PHON: kaj jaʦəkələ kaj lamalala arakaj ku katəmə ki wauɖiuɖipi, lakaɭigili aratukuɭu si ɭənəgə ɖəpətə ki katəmə.
S.FORM: kay yacekele kay lamalala arakay ku kateme ki waudriudripi, lakalrigili aratukulru si lrenege drepete ki kateme.
S.PHON: kaj jaʦəkələ kaj lamalala arakaj ku katəmə ki wauɖiuɖipi, lakaɭigili aratukuɭu si ɭənəgə ɖəpətə ki katəmə.
S.TRANSL: 部落的男人也會用陷阱抓獵物，他們會製作套索陷阱和石壓式陷阱。
The men of the tribe also trap their prey, making lasso traps and rock traps.

S.FORM: ku ama malrigili darepe ku satukulrane kateme, ku ama laiyakay, kikay sarakayyane saramete ki padavathane, lripudriadringayta drele ku tangukakaiyane ki waudriudripi kay kateme la sarare ku kateme pikay ki tangukakaiyane ki waudriudripi ku kadalranane dadavace.
S.PHON: ku ama maɭigili darəpə ku satukuɭanə katəmə, ku ama laijakaj, kikaj sarakajjanə saramətə ki padavaθanə, ɭipuɖiaɖiŋajta ɖələ ku taŋukakaijanə ki wauɖiuɖipi kaj katəmə la sararə ku katəmə pikaj ki taŋukakaijanə ki wauɖiuɖipi ku kadaɭananə dadavaʦə.
S.FORM: ku ama malrigili darepe ku satukulrane kateme, ku ama laiyakay, kikay sarakayyane saramete ki padavathane, lripudriadringayta drele ku tangukakaiyane ki waudriudripi kay kateme la sarare ku kateme pikay ki tangukakaiyane ki waudriudripi ku kadalranane dadavace.
S.PHON: ku ama maɭigili darəpə ku satukuɭanə katəmə, ku ama laijakaj, kikaj sarakajjanə saramətə ki padavaθanə, ɭipuɖiaɖiŋajta ɖələ ku taŋukakaijanə ki wauɖiuɖipi kaj katəmə la sararə ku katəmə pikaj ki taŋukakaijanə ki wauɖiuɖipi ku kadaɭananə dadavaʦə.
S.TRANSL: 我的爸爸很會製作套索陷阱，爸爸說，這是用來捕抓雉雞的，我們要仔細觀察獵物的腳印，陷阱要放在獵物走的路上。

My dad is very good at making lasso traps. Dad said that this is used to catch pheasants. We have to carefully observe the footprints of the prey, and the traps should be placed on the path of the prey.

S.FORM: pakay ku asara tupapalrane ki tarudraudrange alupu, lukakaiya lakicakwanaku dringi kay dringaili, ikasulivate pwalra ki waudriudripi.
S.PHON: pakaj ku asara tupapaɭanə ki taruɖauɖaŋə alupu, lukakaija lakiʦakwanaku ɖiŋi kaj ɖiŋaili, ikasulivatə pwaɭa ki wauɖiuɖipi.
S.FORM: pakay ku asara tupapalrane ki tarudraudrange alupu, lukakaiya lakicakwanaku dringi kay dringaili, ikasulivate pwalra ki waudriudripi.
S.PHON: pakaj ku asara tupapaɭanə ki taruɖauɖaŋə alupu, lukakaija lakiʦakwanaku ɖiŋi kaj ɖiŋaili, ikasulivatə pwaɭa ki wauɖiuɖipi.
S.TRANSL: 為了可以趕快和大人一起去打獵，我每天練習製作陷阱，很快地我的陷阱就真的可以抓到獵物了。
In order to go hunting with adults as soon as possible, I practiced making traps every day, and soon my traps can really catch prey.

S.FORM: sadrele ku ama laiyakay nakwane, lukabibilrili lritara kamaniaku kudra magagarangenga ka taralupu.
S.PHON: saɖələ ku ama laijakaj nakwanə, lukabibiɭili ɭitara kamaniaku kuɖa magagaraŋəŋa ka taralupu.

S.TRANSL: 爸爸看到後對我說我以後一定會是很厲害的獵人。
Dad saw it and told me that I will be a very good hunter in the future.

S.FORM: Kayasasane maadraunganaku watukudra ku buu si lraili, tupalra ki ama karedele alupu.
S.PHON: kajasasanə maaɖauŋanaku watukuɖa ku buu si ɭaili, tupaɭa ki ama karədələ alupu.

S.TRANSL: 現在我長大了，我背起我的弓和箭矢，跟著爸爸一起去打獵。
Now that I have grown up, I carry my bow and arrows and go hunting with my father.

S.FORM: luubalriu, lalri pakisupilri ki sakacekele ku nipanane ku waudriudripi.
S.PHON: luubaɭiu, laɭi pakisupiɭi ki sakaʦəkələ ku nipananə ku wauɖiuɖipi.

S.TRANSL: 回村時將獵到的獵物和族人們分享。
When returning to the village, share the hunted prey with the tribe.

S.FORM: Ku ama laiyakay lrikiaseaseneta ki aidridringane tapatarumarane lakakalra kay panata kay waudriudripi.
S.PHON: ku ama laijakaj ɭikiasəasənəta ki aiɖiɖiŋanə tapatarumaranə lakakaɭa kaj panata kaj wauɖiuɖipi.

S.TRANSL: 爸爸說，我們要感謝祖靈賜福，讓我們有很多獵物收穫。
Dad said, we want to thank the ancestors for their blessings, so that we have a lot of prey to harvest.

S.FORM: Ngiabaladhaku mugaku kaymialrealre.

During class, I and my classmates read the textbook together.

S.TRANSL: 我的好朋友叫Ratage，他也是魯凱族的小孩。
My good friend’s name is Ratage, and he is also an Rukai child.

S.FORM: masilangenay ikay Vedai bingkiw.

S.TRANSL: 我們一起在霧台部落讀書。
We study together in the Vedai tribe.

S.FORM: Tataelreanenay kilalalra luabulru ku marudrawdrangenay, malrigilinay Ngudradreadrekadhane.

We often listen to the elders telling stories together, and we both can speak the Rukai proficiently.

S.FORM: Maelrengaku si kabitulru, ka Ratage kuladhane si edrekane.

S.TRANSL: 我很高也很胖，Ratage很矮也很瘦。
I am tall and overweight, while Ratage is short and thin.

Ratage is very energetic, and everyone likes him a lot.

Today was the school's sports day, and the school organized many competitions.

S.FORM: yakay ku mabibibili, watetere ki malri walailailay si wadralray.

There were tug of war, soccer, running, dancing, and archery.

S.FORM: lrikikalrumalaku lailai.

S.FORM: lrikikalrumalaku lailai.

When I was running, I fell down, and my knees were bleeding.

But I stood up and continued running forward.

Everyone was happy when I reached the finish line.

Although I didn't get first place, I'm glad because I completed the race.

Yesterday, my father and I visited my uncle.

My uncle injured his foot.

He told us that there was a hole in the roof of his house.

S.TRANSL: 他在修理屋頂時，從屋頂摔下來了。
He fell off the roof while repairing it.

S.FORM: Ku ama wailuku ku beate ki lwange si sabiki bai ki agiini ka sawvalay.
S.PHON: ku ama wailuku ku bəatə ki lwaŋə si sabiki bai ki agiini ka sawvalaj.
S.FORM: Ku ama wailuku ku beate ki lwange si sabiki bai ki agiini ka sawvalay.
S.PHON: ku ama wailuku ku bəatə ki lwaŋə si sabiki bai ki agiini ka sawvalaj.
S.TRANSL: 爸爸帶了牛肉和檳榔給叔叔。
My father brought beef and betel nuts for my uncle.

S.FORM: Sakalaelaelaengenay ki agi ki ama idane. pakyasupilri ku taykalrane ku abulru.
S.PHON: sakalaəlaəlaəŋənaj ki agi ki ama idanə. pakjasupiɭi ku tajkaɭanə ku abuɭu.
S.FORM: Sakalaelaelaengenay ki agi ki ama idane. pakyasupilri ku taykalrane ku abulru.
S.PHON: sakalaəlaəlaəŋənaj ki agi ki ama idanə. pakjasupiɭi ku tajkaɭanə ku abuɭu.
S.TRANSL: 我和叔叔在房間裡聊天，他分享了很多故事。
My uncle and I chatted in the room, and he shared many stories.

S.FORM: Salrikatwasengaku ku agi ki ama, ladrengedrengere nakwane madraungasu si aukathriringasu.
S.PHON: saɭikatwasəŋaku ku agi ki ama, laɖəŋəɖəŋərə nakwanə maɖauŋasu si aukaθririŋasu.
S.FORM: Salrikatwasengaku ku agi ki ama, ladrengedrengere nakwane madraungasu si aukathriringasu.
S.PHON: saɭikatwasəŋaku ku agi ki ama, laɖəŋəɖəŋərə nakwanə maɖauŋasu si aukaθririŋasu.
S.TRANSL: 我要離開前，叔叔誇我長高了，也變得更帥氣了。
Before I left, my uncle praised me for growing taller and becoming more handsome.

S.FORM: Laiyaku kayki agi ki ama. lungudringainga kwi drapalesu. kelanga nayyanane kivavange.
S.PHON: laijaku kajki agi ki ama. luŋuɖiŋaiŋa kwi ɖapaləsu. kəlaŋa najjananə kivavaŋə.
S.FORM: Laiyaku kayki agi ki ama. lungudringainga kwi drapalesu. kelanga nayyanane kivavange.
S.PHON: laijaku kajki agi ki ama. luŋuɖiŋaiŋa kwi ɖapaləsu. kəlaŋa najjananə kivavaŋə.
S.TRANSL: 我說：「等叔叔腳好了，下次也來我們家玩。」
I said, “When your foot gets better, come to our house next time and visit us.”

S.FORM: Saka2022kacayli, kay sihu pakaygi ku kacalrilrisyanan ki nibungusiw ku nagane.
S.PHON: saka****kaʦajli, kaj sihu pakajgi ku kaʦaɭiɭisjanan ki nibuŋusiw ku naganə.
S.FORM: Saka2022kacayli, kay sihu pakaygi ku kacalrilrisyanan ki nibungusiw ku nagane.
S.PHON: saka****kaʦajli, kaj sihu pakajgi ku kaʦaɭiɭisjanan ki nibuŋusiw ku naganə.
S.TRANSL: 在2022年，政府召開了原住民身分證可單列族名的會議。
In 2022, the government announced that indigenous identification cards can include tribal names separately.

S.FORM: Maulainga kivavaga ki sihu ku akasivavalane nagane kacalrilrisyane ki nibungusiw acengecenge ki cekele Kulele Gadhu.
S.PHON: maulaiŋa kivavaga ki sihu ku akasivavalanə naganə kaʦaɭiɭisjanə ki nibuŋusiw aʦəŋəʦəŋə ki ʦəkələ kulələ gaðu.
S.FORM: Maulainga kivavaga ki sihu ku akasivavalane nagane kacalrilrisyane ki nibungusiw acengecenge ki cekele Kulele Gadhu.
S.PHON: maulaiŋa kivavaga ki sihu ku akasivavalanə naganə kaʦaɭiɭisjanə ki nibuŋusiw aʦəŋəʦəŋə ki ʦəkələ kulələ gaðu.
S.TRANSL: 我訪問了長期向政府爭取身分證「單列族名」的部落青年Kulele Gadhu。
I interviewed Kulele Gadhu, a young tribal member who has long been advocating for the inclusion of tribal names on identification cards.

S.FORM: Mapapelaelanganay ki lasu ku alrikapane kayki taelratelradhane mwaki dane lini.
S.PHON: mapapəlaəlaŋanaj ki lasu ku aɭikapanə kajki taəɭatəɭaðanə mwaki danə lini.
S.FORM: Mapapelaelanganay ki lasu ku alrikapane kayki taelratelradhane mwaki dane lini.
S.PHON: mapapəlaəlaŋanaj ki lasu ku aɭikapanə kajki taəɭatəɭaðanə mwaki danə lini.
S.TRANSL: 我和他約定好這個假日到他家訪問他。
We had arranged to visit his home this holiday for the interview.

S.FORM: Ikayki takivavaganeli ku tatwaladhane ki naganeini lasiwkaynga nakwane ki wacekecekeleini si cekeleini.
S.PHON: ikajki takivavaganəli ku tatwalaðanə ki naganəini lasiwkajŋa nakwanə ki waʦəkəʦəkələini si ʦəkələini.
S.FORM: Ikayki takivavaganeli ku tatwaladhane ki naganeini lasiwkaynga nakwane ki wacekecekeleini si cekeleini.
S.PHON: ikajki takivavaganəli ku tatwalaðanə ki naganəini lasiwkajŋa nakwanə ki waʦəkəʦəkələini si ʦəkələini.
S.TRANSL: 在訪問的過程中，他向我介紹了他的名字的由來，也帶我認識了他的家人、他的部落。
During the interview, he introduced to me the origin of his name and also introduced me to his family and tribe.

S.FORM: Lakivagaku inyane asukakecenge pabalrithi kay nagane malisi ku natapangimiamyame?
S.PHON: lakivagaku injanə asukakəʦəŋə pabaɭiθi kaj naganə malisi ku natapaŋimiamjamə?
S.FORM: Lakivagaku inyane asukakecenge pabalrithi kay nagane malisi ku natapangimiamyame?
S.PHON: lakivagaku injanə asukakəʦəŋə pabaɭiθi kaj naganə malisi ku natapaŋimiamjamə?
S.TRANSL: 我問他為什麼堅持要改名，舊的登記方式不好嗎?
I asked him why he insisted on changing his name. Wasn’t the old registration method sufficient?

S.FORM: Laiyakay tubalre nakwane, asiluiyane kay pacase ki ciukuku kailrimaka pacengecenge pelaela ku naganeini, kaydruma laikay lu daulu "kusinsi" kavay ki lasu, lamatilrulrupi.
S.PHON: laijakaj tubaɭə nakwanə, asiluijanə kaj paʦasə ki ʦiukuku kaiɭimaka paʦəŋəʦəŋə pəlaəla ku naganəini, kajɖuma laikaj lu daulu "kusinsi" kavaj ki lasu, lamatiɭuɭupi.
S.FORM: Laiyakay tubalre nakwane, asiluiyane kay pacase ki ciukuku kailrimaka pacengecenge pelaela ku naganeini, kaydruma laikay lu daulu "kusinsi" kavay ki lasu, lamatilrulrupi.
S.PHON: laijakaj tubaɭə nakwanə, asiluijanə kaj paʦasə ki ʦiukuku kaiɭimaka paʦəŋəʦəŋə pəlaəla ku naganəini, kajɖuma laikaj lu daulu "kusinsi" kavaj ki lasu, lamatiɭuɭupi.
S.TRANSL: \" which resulted in many jokes being made."
He told me that using Chinese characters could not accurately convey his name, and others would still call him \Ku Xian Sheng

S.FORM: Kulele Gadhu kay kacalrilrisyanane pacase ku nagane patengatengane ka naganeta. kay naganali atalingikayyane ki zukunay retetesanenay takawmaumasanenay, anatumane laarutapangale ku kacalrisyane pasyaulrulri ku naganeini."
S.PHON: kulələ gaðu kaj kaʦaɭiɭisjananə paʦasə ku naganə patəŋatəŋanə ka naganəta. kaj naganali ataliŋikajjanə ki zukunaj rətətəsanənaj takawmaumasanənaj, anatumanə laarutapaŋalə ku kaʦaɭisjanə pasjauɭuɭi ku naganəini."
S.FORM: Kulele Gadhu kay kacalrilrisyanane pacase ku nagane patengatengane ka naganeta. kay naganali atalingikayyane ki zukunay retetesanenay takawmaumasanenay, anatumane laarutapangale ku kacalrisyane pasyaulrulri ku naganeini."
S.PHON: kulələ gaðu kaj kaʦaɭiɭisjananə paʦasə ku naganə patəŋatəŋanə ka naganəta. kaj naganali ataliŋikajjanə ki zukunaj rətətəsanənaj takawmaumasanənaj, anatumanə laarutapaŋalə ku kaʦaɭisjanə pasjauɭuɭi ku naganəini."
S.TRANSL: Gadhu說：「原住民語書寫的名字才是我們真正的名字。我的名字代表了我們的族群、我們的家族、我們的身分，希望能有更多族人找回自己的名字。」
Gadhu said, “The names written in indigenous languages are our true names. My name represents our ethnic group, our family, our identity. I hope more fellow tribespeople can reclaim their own names.”

S.FORM: Kuiya twapalraku ki kayngu mumacisiubay, lailuku ku ngilralredrekeini ku lacenge, ku kacalrilrisyanane si bai nayyane.
S.PHON: kuija twapaɭaku ki kajŋu mumaʦisiubaj, lailuku ku ŋiɭaɭəɖəkəini ku laʦəŋə, ku kaʦaɭiɭisjananə si bai najjanə.
S.FORM: Kuiya twapalraku ki kayngu mumacisiubay, lailuku ku ngilralredrekeini ku lacenge, ku kacalrilrisyanane si bai nayyane.
S.PHON: kuija twapaɭaku ki kajŋu mumaʦisiubaj, lailuku ku ŋiɭaɭəɖəkəini ku laʦəŋə, ku kaʦaɭiɭisjananə si bai najjanə.
S.TRANSL: 昨天我跟奶奶去市集擺攤，奶奶帶了許多自己種的蔬菜去，也製作了原住民美食給大家。
Yesterday, I went to the market with my grandmother to set up a stall. My grandmother brought a lot of vegetables that she grew herself and also prepared indigenous cuisine for everyone.

S.FORM: Madalame kay mapapangale kay siubay ki kayngu, tapangale ku walangay kay kamangulu ngipalrilriding Ka nasubi lapalalava kane ku tudamay ki kayngu.
S.PHON: madalamə kaj mapapaŋalə kaj siubaj ki kajŋu, tapaŋalə ku walaŋaj kaj kamaŋulu ŋipaɭiɭidiŋ ka nasubi lapalalava kanə ku tudamaj ki kajŋu.
S.FORM: Madalame kay mapapangale kay siubay ki kayngu, tapangale ku walangay kay kamangulu ngipalrilriding Ka nasubi lapalalava kane ku tudamay ki kayngu.
S.PHON: madalamə kaj mapapaŋalə kaj siubaj ki kajŋu, tapaŋalə ku walaŋaj kaj kamaŋulu ŋipaɭiɭidiŋ ka nasubi lapalalava kanə ku tudamaj ki kajŋu.
S.TRANSL: 大家很喜歡奶奶的攤位，辣椒和車輪茄很多人買，許多人來品嘗她煮的菜餚。
Everyone loved my grandmother’s stall. Many people bought the chilis and African eggplants, and many people came to taste the dishes she cooked.

S.FORM: ku tudamaini ku maungu si duray ka pagay malimeme turamuru kiamurikay ki badhabadha, lakela makanaelre ki siubaynay siugu.
S.PHON: ku tudamaini ku mauŋu si duraj ka pagaj maliməmə turamuru kiamurikaj ki baðabaða, lakəla makanaəɭə ki siubajnaj siugu.
S.FORM: ku tudamaini ku maungu si duray ka pagay malimeme turamuru kiamurikay ki badhabadha, lakela makanaelre ki siubaynay siugu.
S.PHON: ku tudamaini ku mauŋu si duraj ka pagaj maliməmə turamuru kiamurikaj ki baðabaða, lakəla makanaəɭə ki siubajnaj siugu.
S.TRANSL: 她煮的蕨菜和糯米飯非常好吃，受很多客人歡迎，大家都來我們攤位排隊。
The ferns and sticky rice she cooked were delicious, as well as the braised pork with maqaw pepper and wild boar meat. The flavors attracted many customers, and everyone lined up at our stall.

S.FORM: Laagaga kay kayngu ladawdaulaku ki badhabadha. yathilaku karalealeale, "ngilralredrekenay kaylacenge, kaikanipukeselyrane, bwala kirimwa langay."

S.TRANSL: all-natural and organic! Come and buy now!\""
While my grandmother was cooking, I was on the side attracting customers. I shouted, \The vegetables are self-grown

S.FORM: Lapadalru kingulre kay siubaynay laiyajay kay kayngu, "amani saparalubusu."
S.PHON: lapadaɭu kiŋuɭə kaj siubajnaj laijajaj kaj kajŋu, "amani saparalubusu."

S.PHON: lapadaɭu kiŋuɭə kaj siubajnaj laijajaj kaj kajŋu, "amani saparalubusu."
S.TRANSL: 我們的東西很快就賣完了，奶奶說：「都是因為有你的幫忙。」
Our goods sold out quickly, and my grandmother said, \It’s all thanks to your help.\""

S.FORM: kayaungane kyabulrwaku patharukkay ki supungu si akaneane kacalrisyane ki lrigilane. kilringaw ku sakwalrialri madu siwbay.
S.PHON: kajauŋanə kjabuɭwaku paθarukkaj ki supuŋu si akanəanə kaʦaɭisjanə ki ɭigilanə. kiɭiŋaw ku sakwaɭiaɭi madu siwbaj.

S.PHON: kajauŋanə kjabuɭwaku paθarukkaj ki supuŋu si akanəanə kaʦaɭisjanə ki ɭigilanə. kiɭiŋaw ku sakwaɭiaɭi madu siwbaj.
S.TRANSL: 這個活動，我學到了有關原住民植物和食品的知識，並且體驗到了擺攤的辛苦。
Through this event, I learned about indigenous plants and food and experienced the hard work of running a stall.

S.FORM: sadrelaku ki kayngu marabere pakay kiakaneane ki sidruadrumane arudradraranaku turamuru si sasipyane.
S.PHON: saɖəlaku ki kajŋu marabərə pakaj kiakanəanə ki siɖuaɖumanə aruɖaɖaranaku turamuru si sasipjanə.

S.TRANSL: 看到了奶奶對傳統食物的熱愛，我感到非常驕傲和榮幸。
Seeing my grandmother’s passion for traditional food, I feel very proud and honored.
